title: Patreon CEO says AI can unlock creativity, but lack of regulation is destroying creative people
description: Patreon CEO Jack Conte has raised strong concerns about the impact of artificial intelligence on independent creators. He argues that while AI can unlock creativity, the current system is hurting artists whose work is being used to train these models.
content: The rapid rise of artificial intelligence is disrupting the economy. Techies, marketers and even artists are feeling the shift. While AI tools like image and video generation allow users to bring their imagination to life, the technology is directly ... [3103 chars]

title: Newfoundland and Labrador overhauls procurement after report errors thought to be AI
description: ST. JOHN'S — The Newfoundland and Labrador government has overhauled its process for awarding contracts after false citations thought to be generated by artificial intelligence turned up in two reports, including one prepared by Deloitte Canada.
content:

title: Empyrean Sky Partners Achieves Fastest First Close of 2026, Secures $90 Million for Global Technology Fund
description: SINGAPORE, March 11, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Empyrean Sky Partners (ESP) has completed the fastest first close of 2026, raising US$90 million toward a US$200 million target for its Global Technology Fund. The fund targets growth-stage companies at the convergence of artificial intelligence, robotics and advanced manufacturing - sectors expected to reshape industrial productivity and global technology deployment.

title: South Korea Presidential aide says AI cooperation with UAE could accelerate after conflict
description: SEOUL, March 11 (Reuters) - South Korea's senior presidential secretary for AI, Ha Jung-woo, said on Wednesday that artificial intelligence cooperation with the United Arab Emirates could accelerate after the Middle East conflict ends, given the UAE's need to strengthen its defence capabilities.

title: Can AI tell if your food is ultra-processed? CMC Vellore doctor breaks down what studies found
description: Artificial intelligence is now helping identify ultra-processed foods. A recent study shows tools like ChatGPT can classify foods with high accuracy. This capability is crucial as ultra-processed foods link to serious health issues. AI can speed up dietary analysis for researchers. Experts will still provide oversight. This technology offers a fast way to understand food processing in modern diets.

title: Specsavers co-founder funds PhD eye research
description: NEW research, including the use of artificial intelligence to assess the progression of a common form of blindness, is being funded by Specsavers co-founder Dame Mary Perkins.
